title: Table 1 takeaway
caption: Across 2021-2025 D1 softball, the strongest coefficient in the combined model is `obpfor` (+1.703). Getting on base and limiting opponent baserunners still drives wins.

title: OBP edge vs wins
caption: Biggest OBP edge (min 30 games): Oklahoma (2022) at +0.240 with a 94.8% win rate.

title: Top overperformer
caption: Top overperformer vs model expectation: Eastern Ky. (2021), actual 67.3% vs predicted 50.6% (residual +0.167).

title: Top underperformer
caption: Top underperformer vs model expectation: Coppin St. (2025), actual 9.7% vs predicted 30.8% (residual -0.211).

title: Season-level context
caption: Season with strongest average OBP differential (min 30 games): 2021 (+0.000). At the other end, Mississippi Val. (2025) posted -0.240.
